name: DSX-CA1 Content Agent — Tue/Thu/Sat
notes: Triggers Tue/Thu/Sat at 9am MST (16:00 UTC). Day maps to article_type: Tue=news, Thu=evergreen, Sat=conversion. News type fetches latest headline from GamesRadar RSS. Evergreen and conversion use the agent's built-in keyword/affiliate lists. The FastAPI endpoint runs DSX-CA1 in the background — article appears in /dashboard/queue when complete with status=pending_review. Env vars required: DECODEDSIX_API_URL (FastAPI base URL), DECODEDSIX_API_KEY.
